title: Optimizer removes side-effecting assignment in initial block

features.name: value_plusargs with string output to unused result
features.description: Code should include a $value$plusargs call with string output parameter where the function return value is assigned to an unused variable in an initial block

features.name: multiple value_plusargs assignments in initial block
features.description: Code should include multiple $value$plusargs calls with results assigned to unused dummy variables in an initial block
